step_description: OS-level CPU, Memory, and Disk Latency telemetry from Grafana MCP
narrative_hint: [DEMO CONTEXT] Grafana OS telemetry shows CPU utilization at 99.4% and disk write latency spiked to 48.6ms. This indicates severe host-level resource contention. The database engine is starved of CPU and disk I/O because a virtualization backup job (snapshot snapshot-v88) is executing concurrently on the same hypervisor host physical disk array.
